CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-22-2023 Off Calendar

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-16-2023 Continued To Apr-18-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Hearing
Off Calendar Mar-08-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for request for court judgment by default.

Dept. 505; Judge Harry L. Jacobs; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 09:26:58 a.m. and concluding at 09:46:00 a.m.

Plaintiff Miguel Guzman appearing represented by Megan Johnson, Esq. via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Damian Malone not appearing.

MIGUEL GUZMAN is sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff.

Court has reviewed the case, all filings pertaining to this hearing, and summary of case.
Counsel for Plaintiff presents offer of proof.

MIGUEL GUZMAN is under direct examination.
MIGUEL GUZMAN is examined by the Court. Witness attests that statements made by its counsel are true and correct.

Plaintiff waives costs.

Court finds that DOES 1-10 were DISMISSED on Jul-25-2022 and Defendants Luis and Yolanda Segura Dismissal were DISMISSED on Mar-07-2022.

The matter is submitted.
Based on the summary of the case, comments made by Plaintiff's Counsel and its witness, and evidence presented, the Court finds that Plaintiff has proven each essential element of the complaint.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Miguel Guzman, and against Defendant Damian Malone, as follows:

1. Damages: $3,045,000.00

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $3,045,000.00

Proposed judgment signed as modified.
